channel.title: GitHub Clojure Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Clojure in GitHub

item.title: metabase/metabase
item.description: The simplest, fastest way to get business intelligence and analytics to everyone in your company 😋

item.title: athensresearch/athens
item.description: Free self-hosted desktop app: https://github.com/athensresearch/athens/releases; Paid tiers available through https://opencollective.com/athens; Try the demo at https://athensresearch.github.io/athens; Docs viewable at https://app.gitbook.com/@athensresearch/s/handbook/

item.title: babashka/babashka
item.description: Native, fast starting Clojure interpreter for scripting

item.title: Frozenlock/Bacnet-scan-utils
item.description: Small library to help scan a BACnet network

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source(frontend now, backend later) platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Desktop app download link: https://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases, roadmap: https://trello.com/b/8txSM12G/roadmap

item.title: clj-kondo/clj-kondo
item.description: A linter for Clojure code that sparks joy.

item.title: day8/re-frame
item.description: A ClojureScript framework for building user interfaces, leveraging React

item.title: oxalorg/4ever-clojure
item.description: Pure cljs version of 4clojure, meant to run forever!

item.title: technomancy/leiningen
item.description: Automate Clojure projects without setting your hair on fire.
